svg.title: Throughline workflow in brand colours, with Ask Store and the decision memo as extensions
svg.desc: Eleven layers run top to bottom in green for the knowledge loop, blue for the decision loop, and black for the shared Store hub and Review gate. A green curve on the left carries team feedback back to Capture. A blue curve on the right carries outcomes from Learn back to Strategy. Below the main spine, two extension boxes describe Ask Store, attached to Store, and the decision memo, attached to Validate.

g.text: one source of truth — the hub
cross-cutting: provenance · access control · system ownership · channel routing
